steps.title: Use the discovery clue
steps.content: The passage says summer squash does not closely resemble any wild plant, and genetic research only recently identified its ancestor as the wild johnny gourd. The blank needs a verb meaning made known or discovered.

steps.title: Test the verb meanings
steps.content: Choice B means made larger, which does not fit an ancestor relationship. Choice C means gave support or encouragement. Choice D means made a formal request. Genetic research can reveal an ancestor's identity. The answer is A.
